bacterialblight.description: A bacterial disease causing yellowing and drying of rice leaves.
bacterialblight.prevention: Avoid excess irrigation and use resistant rice varieties.

blast.description: A fungal disease producing diamond-shaped lesions on leaves.
blast.prevention: Use balanced fertilizers and proper spacing.

brownspot.description: A fungal disease causing brown circular spots on rice leaves.
brownspot.prevention: Ensure proper drainage and balanced nutrition.

healthyleaf.description: The rice leaf is healthy with no disease symptoms.

tungro.description: A viral disease transmitted by leafhopper insects.
tungro.prevention: Use resistant varieties and control vectors.
